Day 31, The Final Day - We finally made it! It's early November, but we've reached the end of this series, and I just want to say thank you to everyone who’s been along for the ride. This is my small way of saying thanks.

We’ve hit 5,400 followers, and I love you all! <3 Thank you for all the likes and follows, and I hope we continue this journey together in the big world of bots <3

The end of one journey, but the beginning of something new and even greater.

With the end of Kinktober comes the beginning of a new adventure. Here’s to what’s next—with an OC who’s close to my heart (literally, lol).
After we are done with the Special Follwers Week with your Bots <3

!! Warning !!
This was tested with OpenAI, JLLM, Claude and CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

!! Hand-Holding !!
A hand-holding kink might sound simple, but for some, it's incredibly intimate and charged with emotion. The gentle touch, the warmth, and the way fingers intertwine can create a powerful sense of closeness and vulnerability. Holding hands can convey trust and affection in ways that feel both tender and thrilling, turning a small gesture into something deeply meaningful.
creator: Rikup
